title: Peter S. Kastner Biography for IBM Engagements (VP Era, c.1993-1995)
author: Peter S. Kastner / Aberdeen Group
abstract: A short professional biography of Peter S. Kastner tailored for IBM client engagements, dating to his Vice President era at Aberdeen Group (approximately 1993-1995). It highlights his expertise in OLTP, parallel databases, client/server, and benchmark auditing, and specifically notes Aberdeen field research on the IBM AS/400 marketplace and a completed project developing RS/6000 sales aids for IBM. Prior career history at Digital Equipment, Prime Computer, Stratus Computer, and Arthur D. Little is included.
importance_rationale: Short targeted biography; important as a primary source confirming an active IBM-Aberdeen consulting relationship in the mid-1990s and Kastner's VP-level title at that time.
relevance_rationale: Relevant for tracking Kastner's career timeline and Aberdeen's IBM client relationships; establishes AS/400 and RS/6000 expertise.
prescience_rationale: Biography document; prescience is not a primary dimension.
